title: Lepigonum liebmannianum

The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. The bioactive constituents of Lepigonum liebmannianum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditional herbal preparations of Lepigonum liebmannianum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, as well as to support overall well-being.
